code: import React,{useState}from"react";import axios from"axios";import{useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function AddMerch(){const navigate=useNavigate();const[formData,setFormData]=useState({name:"",price:"",description:"",stock:"",category:""});const[image,setImage]=useState(null);const handleChange=e=>{setFormData({...formData,[e.target.name]:e.target.value});};const handleImageChange=e=>{setImage(e.target.files[0]);};const handleSubmit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();const data=new FormData();data.append("name",formData.name);data.append("price",formData.price);data.append("description",formData.description);data.append("stock",formData.stock);data.append("category",formData.category);data.append("image",image);try{const res=await axios.post("http://localhost:4000/merch",data,{headers:{"Content-Type":"multipart/form-data"}});console.log("Merch added:",res.data);navigate("/merch");}catch(error){console.error(error);alert("Failed to add merch");}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",name:"name",placeholder:"Merch Name",onChange:handleChange}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"number",name:"price",placeholder:"Price",onChange:handleChange}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("textarea",{name:"description",placeholder:"Description",onChange:handleChange}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"number",name:"stock",placeholder:"Stock",onChange:handleChange}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",name:"category",placeholder:"Category",onChange:handleChange}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"file",name:"image",accept:"image/*",onChange:handleImageChange}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:"Add Merch"})]});}export default AddMerch;
